Intraday post (27/Jan)

Weekly post:

FOMC Week, long zomma/short vomma | Weekly post (26-30/Jan)

I dropped a very important broader macro and micro market report containing institutionals, geo, yen etc-etc.:

Earning season, Micro and Macro flows, Carry trade & Geopolitic landscape | Quant Insights - January 2026

Geo context including “Board of Peace”:

I’d like to draw your attention to my latest post on Twitter here.Very important.

Also, in the near future, I plan to create weekly or monthly short “podcast” audios from myself, that will be free, talking about markets and context and some quant stuffs, also topics like AI etc. besides my planned monthly/quarterly free market reports.

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The speed profile is net negative especially to the upside, but to me it is more about “not letting the market fall through the centroid” than upward squeeze. Upside vomma is very heavily shorted by customers.

Centroid is at 6966.12 - 6968.78This is a mid-to-high probability “line in the sand”, with potential local pin to 6950.

Downside pivot is at 6942.08Target is 6904.56The downside target is pretty supportive, and “pinner”, but downside pivot is highly a reversion target towards the centroid (especially in the afternoon).

Upside pivot is at 6978.57Target is 6994.97The target is magnetic, (6980 too, depends on 6988 after 2PM), but the upside pivot is also pretty hard to break. Market should break above at least 6970/75 during the AM session in order to hold the upside pivot and get into the upside gravity field.

Be careful with unexpected news.As I keep repeating, market is headline sensitive.
